positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical mystical forest scene composed entirely of stylized botanical elements and ethereal geometric shapes. The central composition features luminous glowing mushrooms, swirling vine patterns, and silhouetted bioluminescent flora. Style: Intricate linocut engraving mixed with watercolor wash, rendered with deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, and glowing gold accents. Composition should be centered, suitable for a square apparel print, emphasizing clean, solid silhouettes and strong contrast against a single background color. Crisp vector aesthetic, perfect for screen printing, maximalist but legible.
